能力 加一 没有做到全文统一，比较看实际情况。但是依然无法阻止这本书的优秀。末世小说泛滥成灾，能找到一本合胃口，一直看下去的并不多。2025年1月3日的角度来看，7分着实有些低了，而且很多人是根本没朝下看，遇到不符合自己主观看法的就来打分了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735869593,"group_id":"7267070912665488418","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2430381388211228"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7267070912665488418","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"489"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":120835,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":147515,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7366292607064933182","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星评价如下，后宫剧情极其克制，都是成年人点几句都懂，剧情推进相当舒服，取消了泛滥的晶核升级的套路，用男主天赋自然而然的开始团队建设，希望提高女性人物实力，你懂的花瓶只需要最美得几个就行了，其他都要有用。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715103208,"group_id":"7267070912665488418","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"四十岁的人生幼稚也浑浑噩噩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+UWbs5vqxlctc7kTI4bkY/2C4UmQ9AF/5d5NprwQEqe","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2430381388211228","user_name":"月月的胖老爸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2430381388211228","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c77
